title: rubus callosus var. lingua
intro: Rubus callosus var. lingua, also known as the Mountain Strawberry or the Tongue-leaf Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus callosus var. lingua include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as promoting digestive health and reducing the risk of certain diseases. Rubus callosus var. lingua can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
